description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named publish nuget that triggers on push events with any tag. The workflow should run on an ubuntu-latest environment, checking out the repository, setting up .NET 5, and then dynamically setting a version number in a specific C# file based on the GitHub tag. It then packages multiple .NET projects with a version derived from the GitHub tag and pushes the resulting NuGet packages to nuget.org using a provided API key.
